titleStmt.title: SII 27.74: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 74. (A.R. No. 351 of 1934-35.) HAMPI, HOSPET TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: Rock near a tank behind the temple of Prasanna-Āñjanēya in Hēmakūṭa.

This Sanskrit record, in Nāgarī characters, states that Virūpākshapaṇḍita and Vināyaka-paṇḍita, sons of Gaṇapati-paṇḍita and Kamalāṁbā and grandson of Rāghava-paṇḍita constructed a shrine along with a sukanāsa for the god Virūpāksha-Śrīpāda-Śrīvallabha, excavated a tank called Śrīvallabha-tīrtha to the left of the shrine and planted trees, etc. Both of them belonged to the Bhāradvāja-gōtra of Mādhyandina-śākha and the former of them is said to have been the author of thirteen works. The king is stated to have been ruling in Vijayanagara with his queen Viṭṭhaladēvī.

The record is dated Śaka 1318, (also expressed by the chronogram siddhi-glau-guṇa-chaṁdra) Īśvara, Pushya ba. 8, Monday. The details given are irregular, for, in the cyclic year, corresponding with Śaka 1319, the tithi fell on Friday, January 11 of 1398, A.D. In the next year, i.e. Śaka 1320, Bahudhānya the tithi corresponded with 1398 A.D., December 30, Monday, f.d.t. ·43.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī 1318 śakaḥ .
śrīḥ . O namo gaṇeśāya . O namaḥ śrī virupākṣasidva śrīpāda śrī vallabhāya trāryāmastaka mā
ṇikya yogihṛnpadmaṣaṭpadu . śrī gaṁtrakūṭa śrīpāda śrī vallabha namostu te . 1 sidviglauguṇa caṁdra śrī sā
livāhana śabdake . hi(ī)śvarābde puṣya kṛṣṇa pakṣeṣṭamyuḍu śaḍdine . 2 śrīhemakūṭesiddha śrīpāda śrīvalla
bho vibhuḥ . prādurāsītsvayaṁ sidvo bhuvo bhakteṣṭamuktidaḥ . 3 yaṁ sadā vedāḥ stuvaṁti . kālesminvijayanagara
rājaghānyāṁ śrī vīra pratāpa rājendraḥ svārddhāṁgalaśmyā viṭṭala devyā dīvyati . tadā śrībhāra
dvājagotraja vedaśāstrakarma bhatkijñānasiddha rāja prāṇācāryyavaryya mādhyaṁdina śrīrā
ghavapaṁḍitātmaja śrī gaṇapatipaṁḍita kamalāṁbā tanuja śrī virupākṣa paṁḍita vināyakapaṁḍitābhyāṁ
kṛtā devaseveyaṁ . devagarbhagṛhaṁ śukanāsānvitaṁ devanāma bhāgasya śrī siddha śrīpāda śrīvallabhatobhī
ravyaṁ saraḥ śailavṛndāvanavaṭāsvayauṁ ce ti . śrī vi
rupākṣapaṁḍitena 93 graṁthāḥ . O śrīḥ .
Digital edition of SII 27.74 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
